sparscit.set_defaults(n_jobs: int | None = None, DEBUG: bool | None = None, figsize: tuple[int, int] | None = None, use_constrained_layout: bool | None = None) → None[source]

Change global settings for SparSCit.

Parameters:

  • n_jobs – Number of parallel jobs (-1 for all cores)

  • DEBUG – Whether to enable debug mode

  • figsize – Default figure size for all plots

  • use_constrained_layout – Whether to use constrained layout for matplotlib figures
